coach.hint: Chunk it: I think you did the right thing by calling us immediately as soon as you lost the card because, / you know, / only us have the access to immediately freeze your account and block your card.

items.line_en: Yeah, that's what I thought.

coach.say: Yeah, that's what I thought.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yeah, / that's what I thought.

items.line_en: So is there anything else that you need what you do?

coach.say: So is there anything else that you need what you do?
coach.hint: Chunk it: So is there anything else that you need what you do?

items.line_en: That should be all from me, but I just want to make sure I have covered everything and please let me know if I miss something.

coach.say: That should be all from me, but I just want to make sure I have covered everything and please let me know if I miss something.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That should be all from me, / but I just want to make sure I have covered everything and please let me know if I miss something.

items.line_en: Okay, so first we started by blocking your card and freezing your account, then we updated your contact information with your email and phone number.

coach.say: Okay, so first we started by blocking your card and freezing your account, then we updated your contact information with your email and phone number.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, / so first we started by blocking your card and freezing your account, / then we updated your contact information with your email and phone number.

items.line_en: And then I filed a claim for all the unauthorized transactions.

coach.say: And then I filed a claim for all the unauthorized transactions.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And then I filed a claim for all the unauthorized transactions.

items.line_en: I've also generated a new account number for you and had the balance transfer from your old account to your new one.

coach.say: I've also generated a new account number for you and had the balance transfer from your old account to your new one.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I've also generated a new account number for you and / had the balance transfer from your old account to your new one.

items.line_en: The case has been submitted to the fraud department and you should hear back within 10 business days.

coach.say: The case has been submitted to the fraud department and you should hear back within 10 business days.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The case has been submitted to the fraud department and / you should hear back within 10 business days.

items.line_en: Alerts are already set up on your account and please check your email all the time and report any suspicious activities.

coach.say: Alerts are already set up on your account and please check your email all the time and report any suspicious activities.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Alerts are already set up on your account and please check your email all the time and / report any suspicious activities.

items.line_en: Have I covered everything?

coach.say: Have I covered everything?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Have I covered everything?

items.line_en: Yep, you've covered everything.

coach.say: Yep, you've covered everything.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yep, / you've covered everything.

items.line_en: Thank you so much for helping me.

coach.say: Thank you so much for helping me.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you so / much for helping me.

items.line_en: You've been very helpful.

coach.say: You've been very helpful.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You've been very helpful.

items.line_en: I'll wait for the result of the investigation.

coach.say: I'll wait for the result of the investigation.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'll wait for the result of the investigation.

items.line_en: You're most welcome as Rogers.

coach.say: You're most welcome as Rogers.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You're most welcome as Rogers.

items.line_en: I understand how nerve wracking this is for you to see the funds disappearing from the account.

coach.say: I understand how nerve wracking this is for you to see the funds disappearing from the account.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I understand how nerve wracking this is for you to see the funds disappearing from the account.

items.line_en: And we will do our best to speed up the investigation and you should hear back from us within the 10 business day timeframe.

coach.say: And we will do our best to speed up the investigation and you should hear back from us within the 10 business day timeframe.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And we will do our best to speed up the investigation and / you should hear back from us within the 10 business day timeframe.

items.line_en: Now for the last step, I will get an online fraud specialist to assist you further and help you in regaining your online access.

coach.say: Now for the last step, I will get an online fraud specialist to assist you further and help you in regaining your online access.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Now for the last step, / I will get an online fraud specialist to assist you further and help you in regaining your online access.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Are you going to transfer me?

items.line_en: Yes, you will be ending the call with an online fraud specialist and he will be helping you enable the login to your new account.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, / you will be ending the call with an online fraud specialist and he will be helping you enable the login to your new account.
